claimText: Netra MkII is India's next-generation Airborne Early Warning and Control System (AWACS) programme.
evidenceExcerpt: Netra MkII is India's next-generation Airborne Early Warning and Control System (AWACS) programme.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the purpose and nature of the Netra MkII programme.
distractorHooks: Confusing Netra MkII with a fighter jet, submarine, or unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)
Confusing it with a foreign AWACS system

claimText: The Netra MkII Airborne Early Warning and Control System will be mounted on the Airbus A321 platform.
evidenceExcerpt: The Netra MkII system will be mounted on the Airbus A321 platform.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question matching the AWACS system to its specific aircraft platform.

claimText: Netra MkII functions as a flying command centre designed to detect, track, and monitor threats across vast distances.
evidenceExcerpt: It functions as a flying command centre to detect, track, and monitor threats over vast distances.
examUse: Statement-based question on the operational capabilities and strategic role of the Netra MkII.
distractorHooks: Describing it solely as a troop transport aircraft
Describing it as a ground-based radar system
Describing it as an offensive strike aircraft
